security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; frame-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'self' blob:

bundle.shortDescription: View UBL e-invoices and credit notes
bundle.longDescription: A fast, private desktop viewer for UBL e-invoices and credit notes (Peppol BIS Billing 3.0 / EN 16931). Everything is parsed and rendered on-device.
